_comment_repo_root: Path to the target project's root, relative to this config file. All scope paths are relative to repo_root.
_comment_docs_root: Where to emit generated docs, relative to this config file.
_comment_scope: Choose EXACTLY ONE of scope_file | scope | auto_discover.
_comment_factory_patterns: If the project uses factory-style registries (like DeepXube's @updater_factory.register_class('key')), configure how they look. Each pattern says: 'a decorator call whose attribute is this method_name counts as a registration'. Leave the defaults if your project uses .register_class(). Set to [] if the project has no factory pattern.
_comment_factory_instances: How to detect factory instance declarations. Default matches `foo: Factory[Bar] = Factory[Bar]('...')`. Each string is a prefix of the type annotation.
